prompt: Text rendering is jagged and aliased. What is the bug?
choices: drawString requires a Font to be set before rendering
Graphics2D antialiasing is disabled by default; text appears aliased/jagged; enable it with g2.setRenderingHint(RenderingHints.KEY_TEXT_ANTIALIASING, RenderingHints.VALUE_TEXT_ANTIALIAS_ON)
BufferedImage.TYPE_INT_RGB does not support text rendering
drawString must be called on the EDT for antialiasing to work
explanation: By default, Graphics2D does not apply antialiasing, resulting in jagged text edges. Fix: call g2.setRenderingHint(RenderingHints.KEY_TEXT_ANTIALIASING, RenderingHints.VALUE_TEXT_ANTIALIAS_ON) before drawString to enable smooth text rendering.
